---
title: "About"
description:
author:
  - name: Joseph Bulbulia
    url: https://josephbulbulia.netlify.app
    affiliation: Victoria University of Wellington
    affiliation_url: https://www.wgtn.ac.nz
    orcid_id: 0000-0002-5861-2056
date: 2021-FEB-28
output:
  distill::distill_article:
    self_contained: false
    toc: true
--- 
```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = FALSE)
```

## Purpose

The purpose of this site is to convey science, broadly conceived, to the community, broadly conceived. 

## Views 

The views expressed here are entirely my own. They do not necessarily reflect the views of any institution with which I am affiliated. 




My contact: joseph.bulbulia@vuw.ac.nz
